title: Selling Design Assets with Crypto Payments Explained for Digital Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Selling design assets online is a lucrative business, but many digital creators face a significant hurdle: geographic restrictions imposed by popular payment platforms like PayPal. For instance, Nigerian artists or Ghanaian designers may find it challenging to accept payments for their ebooks, courses, or templates using PayPal due to restrictions on their locations. This problem is further complicated by the need for Know-Your-Customer (KYC) verification, which can be a time-consuming and frustrating process. Unchained Commerce aims to bridge this gap by providing a seamless and secure way for digital creators to sell their assets and get paid in cryptocurrency, without the need for PayPal or other traditional payment processors.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

When you sell digital products, you want to ensure that you receive payment quickly and securely, without worrying about geographic restrictions or KYC requirements. The platform you choose should be able to handle multiple payment methods, including cryptocurrency, to cater to a global audience. Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) is specifically designed for this purpose, allowing you to integrate a frontend wallet with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds, so buyers can pay in their preferred cryptocurrency, such as BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, or one of the 300+ other coins supported.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Pricing digital products in crypto is simpler than most creators expect. You set your price in USD. The Web3 Wallet Connect module pulls live exchange rates from price feeds and displays the equivalent amount in whatever coin the buyer chooses — Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, Solana, or 300 more options. The buyer always pays the USD equivalent at the time of transaction. NOWPayments handles the currency conversion accounting. You receive the crypto equivalent of your USD price in your wallet. For USDT-priced products, there is no conversion at all — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus network fees that typically amount to less than one percent of the transaction.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Unchained Commerce's platform is designed for digital creators who face geographic restrictions or KYC requirements when trying to sell their assets online. Whether you're an artist from Nigeria, a designer from Ghana, or a writer from Pakistan, you can use Web3 Wallet Connect to accept payments in cryptocurrency and reach a global audience. Our platform is built to be user-friendly and accessible, so you can focus on creating and selling your digital products, without the hassle of payment processing.
You can sell your ebooks, courses, and templates without using PayPal or other traditional payment processors.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Our platform consists of three key components: the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and the Admin Dashboard. The Core Shop Engine is the backend of our platform, which handles payment verification, automated delivery, and PDF receipts. Web3 Wallet Connect is the frontend wallet integration that allows buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. The Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and order management, so you can track your sales and customers with ease.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand how Unchained Commerce's platform works, it's time to take action. Here are the concrete steps to get started: Create an account on our platform and set up your shop; Choose the digital products you want to sell and configure your payment options using Web3 Wallet Connect; Set up your Admin Dashboard to track your sales and customers; Start marketing your shop and products to reach a global audience; And, most importantly, get ready to receive payments in cryptocurrency and expand your customer base.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The most common question we get is: 'How can I sell my ebooks or templates without using PayPal or other traditional payment processors?' The answer is straightforward: you can use Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, which integrates a frontend wallet with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds, allowing buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. This way, you can reach a global audience and receive payments securely, without worrying about geographic restrictions or KYC requirements."
